Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9480 "SUPERSPRINT-1TO4-5000-9480" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $5000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Super Sprint - Tracks 1-4.prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the BEQ instruction at $AC3D to remove the option to load tracks 5-8 and just offer tracks 1-4 again.
